Package org.example.presentation.gui

Class ApplicationController

java.lang.Object
org.example.presentation.gui.ApplicationController
public class ApplicationController extends Object
Represents application controller in the system.

  • Constructor Details

    • ApplicationController

      public ApplicationController(AdminAuthService authService, AppointmentService appointmentService, AppointmentBookingService appointmentBookingService, SessionManager sessionManager, UserRegistrationService userRegistrationService, PasswordRecoveryService passwordRecoveryService)
      Creates a new application controller object with the given values.
      Parameters:
      authService - service used to run business logic
      appointmentService - service used to run business logic
      appointmentBookingService - service used to run business logic
      sessionManager - manager object used for shared app state

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts this part of the application.

    • openLoginFrame

      public void openLoginFrame()
      Opens login frame in the user interface.

    • openSignUpFrame

      public void openSignUpFrame()
      Opens sign up frame in the user interface.

    • openForgotPasswordFrame

      public void openForgotPasswordFrame()
      Opens forgot password frame in the user interface.

    • registerUser

      public SignUpStatus registerUser(String username, String email, String password, String confirmPassword)
      Registers a user through registration service.
      Parameters:
      username - unique username for login identity
      email - email address used for login or matching
      password - password text entered by the user
      confirmPassword - password confirmation text entered by the user
      Returns:
      status that explains the operation result

    • signUp

      public SignUpStatus signUp(String email, String password)
      Registers a user with email and password.
      Parameters:
      email - email address used for login or matching
      password - password text entered by the user
      Returns:
      status that explains the operation result

    • requestPasswordReset

      public ForgotPasswordStatus requestPasswordReset(String usernameOrEmail)
      Requests a password reset code for a user.
      Parameters:
      usernameOrEmail - username or email used for identity
      Returns:
      status that explains the operation result

    • resetPassword

      public ForgotPasswordStatus resetPassword(String usernameOrEmail, String resetCode, String newPassword, String confirmPassword)
      Resets password after validating reset data.
      Parameters:
      usernameOrEmail - username or email used for identity
      resetCode - reset verification code
      newPassword - password text entered by the user
      confirmPassword - password confirmation text entered by the user
      Returns:
      status that explains the operation result

    • resetPassword

      public ForgotPasswordStatus resetPassword(String email, String newPassword)
      Resets password directly with email and new password.
      Parameters:
      email - email address used for login or matching
      newPassword - password text entered by the user
      Returns:
      status that explains the operation result

    • handleSuccessfulLogin

      public void handleSuccessfulLogin(AuthenticationAttemptResult result)
      Stores session data after a successful login and opens the dashboard.
      Parameters:
      result - value for result

    • openDashboard

      public void openDashboard(AuthenticationAttemptResult result)
      Opens dashboard in the user interface.
      Parameters:
      result - value for result

    • logoutAndOpenLogin

      public void logoutAndOpenLogin()
      Logs out the current session and returns to the login screen.
